instruction: Describe a general mitigation strategy for this type of vulnerability.
input: Reflected cross-site scripting vulnerability in Quiz And Survey Master versions prior to 7.3.7 allows a remote attacker to inject an arbitrary script via unspecified vectors.
output: To mitigate reflected XSS vulnerabilities, implement rigorous input validation, context-aware output encoding, and security headers such as Content Security Policy (CSP) to prevent unwanted script execution.
